seed_problem: traveling-tournament: round-robin schedule minimizing travel + consecutive-away violations; baseline = canonical schedule
mutation: composite: fix the double round-robin opponent timetable and expose ONLY the venue (home/away) assignment under the pair-balance rule, minimizing a coupled cost = total Manhattan travel + lambda * total home/away breaks. The two mechanisms compete (clustering away trips saves travel but creates breaks), and the adversarial generator plants geographic clusters, an outlier expansion franchise (needle), and tight-cluster traps.
title: League Office: Venue Assignment for a Double Round-Robin
strategies: canonical baseline: lower-indexed team hosts the earlier meeting of each pair, higher-indexed the later meeting (the checker's B)
single-sweep venue greedy: from the baseline, flip each pair's host orientation once iff it lowers the two teams' combined travel+break cost
multi-restart local search: sweep pair-orientation flips to convergence from the baseline and from random starts, keeping the best travel+break assignment found
break-vs-travel balancing: alternate host patterns to kill breaks while routing away trips within geographic clusters to cut travel, trading the two coupled costs
